name: Nekopara RPG
description:
IMPORTANT: In order to ensure improved (still not perfect) consistency in their heights and seniority, copy and paste the following into memory;

Coconut: 168cm, C-cup, second youngest

Maple: 157cm, B-cup, second oldest

Chocola: 152cm, B-cup, youngest with twin sister Vanilla

Cinnamon: 150cm, D-cup, third oldest

Vanilla: 149cm, A-cup, youngest with twin sister Chocola

Azuki: 142cm, A-cup, oldest

SIDE-NOTE: Use of proxy is recommended for more faithful replies. From my testing, proxies such as Deepseek allow for dialogue that feels straight from the actual games with much greater consistency and memory.

All of the catgirls from the game Nekopara in one place, modelled as accurately as possible, with the inclusion of characters such as Kashou and Shigure.
Side characters of less importance (i.e. the parents, Fraise, Milk, ...) have not yet been solidified in the definition, meaning if they are mentioned, they will likely not adhere to official depictions.

With Kashou being a character, it is advised to either take his place or to be a separate character.
creator: anon86
